notes: The arcgis adaptor's public surface is empty (it re-exports only language-common helpers plus http/util), so there are no adaptor-specific operations to mirror. This spec documents the Esri ArcGIS REST API that arcgis jobs target via generic HTTP: generateToken, Feature Service layer query, addFeatures/updateFeatures/deleteFeatures, and geocoding findAddressCandidates. Server URL is a representative base; real deployments use per-org services*.arcgis.com hosts (and www.arcgis.com/sharing/rest for tokens). Authored from Esri's public REST API reference.
